mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_preferences (user_id, dark_mode, auto_close_timer, volume_level, default_play_speed, enable_notifications, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{darkMode}, #{autoCloseTimer}, #{volumeLevel}, #{defaultPlaySpeed}, #{enableNotifications}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE dark_mode = VALUES(dark_mode), auto_close_timer = VALUES(auto_close_timer), volume_level = VALUES(volume_level), default_play_speed = VALUES(default_play_speed), enable_notifications = VALUES(enable_notifications), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, dark_mode, auto_close_timer, volume_level, default_play_speed, enable_notifications, created_at, updated_at FROM user_preferences WHERE user_id = #{userId}
